item.title: More than 200,000 landlords and sole traders ‘face up to 10%’ cost hike as Making Tax Digital looms
item.description: Around 212,500 UK businesses face potentially ‘tens of millions’ in extra accountancy costs under the government’s incoming Making Tax Digital initiat...

item.title: Inheritance tax investigations chase 14,000 bereaved families for underpayment
item.description: HMRC investigated a third more families over inheritance tax bills in the three years to April 2025 following a government crackdown on underpayments.

item.title: How to invest as the shine wears off consumer brands
item.description: Consumer brands no longer impress with their labels. Customers just want what works at a bargain price. That’s a problem for the industry giants, says...

item.title: Why annuities are back in fashion for retirees
item.description: The appeal of annuities has been boosted by higher interest rates. So should you buy an annuity with part of your pension savings?

item.title: The downfall of Peter Mandelson
item.description: Peter Mandelson is used to penning resignation statements, but his latest might well be his last. He might even face time in prison.
